pr.title: Record: AdamW TTT 30ep Cosine + Per-Layer LR (val_bpb: 1.0705)

output.summary: Use AdamW 30-epoch cosine-decayed TTT with per-layer LR multipliers and all layers unfrozen to adapt the PR #549 base via validation-only training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: The TTT run trains on the entire validation stream (tokens pre-graded) to adapt the model before scoring, matching the val-only protocol.
techniques: AdamW TTT with cosine schedule over 30 epochs
Validation stream used for adaptation batches
